text.title: Retainer vs Project Rubric Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure: scaffold → score each dimension → aggregate + recommend → calibration pass → publish.

step.name: scaffold
step.action: Copy `templates/skeleton.md`. Populate dimensions with current names + anchors.

step.name: score-each-dimension
step.action: Run `score-dimension` per dimension. Pick integer 1-5 + cite the anchor text that matches + attach evidence (brief section, transcript, P&L line).

step.name: aggregate-and-recommend
step.action: Run `aggregate-and-recommend`. Sum scores; map to recommendation per published bands (e.g., 20-25 retainer, 15-19 hybrid, 10-14 project, <10 decline).

step.name: calibration-pass
step.action: Run `calibration-pass`. If any dimension scores differ by > 1 between reviewers, discuss + reconcile + log the reconciliation note.
step.decision-gate: If reviewers cannot reach agreement within 1 point, defer to founder + document disagreement.

step.name: publish
step.action: Validator runs. Commit to repo. Update `last_reviewed`. Notify sales pipeline.
